breakdown: This PR fixes level-up regression bugs by replacing the private `_extract_xp_from_player_data` function with the shared `extract_character_xp` helper, and adds new logic to extract XP from `combat_summary.xp_awarded` and `encounter_summary.xp_awarded` fields. The changes improve code reuse but tests for the removed function remain in the codebase. Error handling uses `coerce_int` with defaults and `isinstance` checks, but lacks explicit exception handling for the shared helper.
key_changes: Remove duplicate `_extract_xp_from_player_data` function and replace with `extract_character_xp`
Add `xp_awarded` extraction from combat_summary with isinstance check
Add `xp_awarded` extraction from encounter_summary with isinstance check
Update references in _is_god_mode_return_to_story to use extract_character_xp
Update references in _handle_update_state_command to use extract_character_xp
